journal_issue: No issue number is provided; the date '2021 Dec 1' is specific but does not correspond to any Cell issue. Missing issue is a minor inconsistency.
journal_page: Pages 590-635 are very long for an essay in Cell (typically 10-20 pages). Combined with volume mismatch, this is suspect.
